---
title: "When the Codebase Starts Instrumenting Itself"
subtitle: "CNCF Co-located Events Europe 2026"
author: "Whitney Lee"
format: revealjs
---

## {background-color="#00897B"}

::: {.r-fit-text}
Placeholder slides — see `talk/demo-flow.md` for the talk structure
:::

::: {.notes}
Slides will be built section by section following the demo flow.
:::
